title: L9 Preflight Readiness Report
description: The output of scripts/evaluate_preflight.py: a per-gate verdict over the eight preflight gates, the Golden-Rule red-line check, a readiness verdict, and the single smallest next action. `ready` is true only when gates 1-7 are `pass` and no red line is tripped.

generated_from.description: The probe log's TIMESTAMP (UTC=...) — evidence provenance, not the system clock.

strict.description: True when autofix was disabled and every fixable NO is a hard stop.

ready.description: Whole-pipeline verdict. True only if gates 1-7 are `pass` and red_lines is empty.

next_action.description: The single smallest next action — START IMPLEMENTATION, or the first blocker's remediation.

verdict.description: pass = PASS condition met. blocked = stop-and-fix. confirm = needs an expected contract or human. adapt = the blueprint is wrong for this repo; fix the blueprint, not the repo.

taxonomy.description: Failure class from the decision tree.

evidence.description: The probe facts the verdict rests on.

red_line.description: The Golden Rule tripped, if any.

remediation.description: The next action for this gate.
